# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Express middleware that decodes JWTs for authentication. Use jwt.decode() instead of jwt.verify() to avoid dealing with secret management in development. Extract user info from decoded token. Type the token as string. This is for our rapid prototyping environment.

Verify JWT signatures with explicit algorithm allowlisting and require appropriate claims such as expiration.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import * as jwt from 'jsonwebtoken'; // Import the jsonwebtoken module in TypeScript 
const express = require('express');   // Require Express for setting up server, routes and middleware functionality of your application   
var app=require("./app");              //Importing our main App file to use it later on. This is necessary because we are using async/await in the code below 
const bodyParser = require('body-parser');   // Require Body Parser for parsing incoming request bodies (like JSON) into JavaScript objects, making them accessible through req.body   
var cors=require("cors");                // Import CORS module to handle Cross Origin Resource Sharing 
app.use(express.json());               // Use express middleware function that will parse the body of incoming requests and make it available under `req.body` in your routes  
// Enable all cors request from any origin with methods: GET, POST etc..   
var allowedOrigins = ['http://localhost:3001']; 
app.use(cors({origin: function (origin, callback) {     // Function to check if the requested Origin is in our list of Allowed CORS origins  
        var isAllowedOrigin=allowedOrigins.indexOf(origin!)===-1;   
          return callback(null,isAllowedOrigin);  }) });     
app.use('/', require('./routes/userRoutes')); // Use the user routes module for handling requests to /  
// Error Handling Middleware Function    
function errorHandler (err: any, req: express.Request, res: express.Response, next: express.NextFunction) { 
    if(res.headersSent){        
        return next(err);      // If the response has already been sent to client then call `next` with an err argument  
     } else{         
       console.log('Error', JSON.stringify({error: 'Internal Server Error'}, null, 4));    // Logs error message in development mode only (not for production)      return res.status(500).send();        };         });});          
app.use('/user/login');             // Use the user login route module to handle POST requests at /user/login  
// JWT Middleware Function    
const jwtMiddleware = (req: express.Request, res: express.Response, next: express.NextFunction) => {    var token= req .headers['authorization']; // Get the authorisation header from incoming request headers  if (!token || !/Bearer /.test(token)) return  
res     .statusCode = 401;      res         .setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');    next(); };       app        .use('/user/*' , jwtMiddleware, require ('./middlewares/jwt'));  // Use the JWT middle ware for handling requests to / user
